title: The myth of Claude Mythos crumbles as small open models hunt the same cybersecurity bugs Anthropic showcased
what_happened: Anthropic has kept its Claude Mythos cybersecurity model on a short leash, pointing to capabilities it says no rival can match. But two new studies suggest that even small, openly available models can reproduce most of the vulnerability analyses Anthropic has put on display. title: Deepseek reportedly seeks outside funding for the first time at $10 billion valuation
what_happened: Deepseek is reportedly ready to give up its independence. The Chinese AI startup is seeking outside backers for the first time, aiming to raise at least $300 million. title: Schematik Is ‘Cursor for Hardware.’ Anthropic Wants In
what_happened: Schematik is a program that aims to help people vibe code for physical devices. Hopefully, it won’t blow anything up.

title: Simulating Human Cognition: Heartbeat-Driven Autonomous Thinking Activity Scheduling for LLM-based AI systems
